stemHtml: Which of the following is correct concerning the constituents of the blood?

options.a: Platelets play an important role in the immune defence of the body; a lack of functional platelets makes the body vulnerable to infectious diseases.
options.b: A shortage of white blood cells prevents efficient elimination of the waste products of the cell metabolism.
options.c: A reduction in the oxygen carrying capacity of the red blood cells can cause hypoxia.
options.d: The majority of transported gases is dissolved in the plasma.
